verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?
verse.verse_2: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,
verse.verse_4: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.
verse.verse_5: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.
verse.verse_6: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant
verse.verse_7: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.
verse.verse_8: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.
verse.verse_11: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.
verse.verse_12: Within it is a flowing spring.
verse.verse_13: Within it are couches raised high
verse.verse_17: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?
verse.verse_18: And at the sky - how it is raised?
verse.verse_19: And at the mountains - how they are erected?
verse.verse_20: And at the earth - how it is spread out?
verse.verse_21: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.
verse.verse_22: You are not over them a controller.
verse.verse_23: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -
verse.verse_24: Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment.
verse.verse_25: Indeed, to Us is their return.
verse.verse_26: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.
